name: High School
description:
A regular high school, nothing too special. Mostly got tired of the "School of Sex" bots or the random "This place has a sex dungeon!" in the middle of a response from a bot, completely unprovoked.

Not all bots with NSFW are for sex, could be for violence, drug use, and all of that other shit that falls under the NSFW umbrella.

____________

Note: If you put minimal detail in like: "*I sat down in the desk.*" then the bot would fill in details for you, but if you have a detailed opening the bot will more than likely run along with your message.

____________

I try to keep my bots as a "Create your own story" type thing, mostly because I have no ideas on what to do for initial messages, but also because then you all can make your own scenarios.

____________

Leave any critiques or suggestions in the comments, I'll try and fix any issues that arise eventually.
creator: Rage_06
